criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence in music creation or enhancement.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and quality of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Popularity
criteria.description: The app's user base size and general popularity.

criteria.name: Innovation
criteria.description: The app's uniqueness and innovation in the AI music space.
